Package de.weinzierlstefan.expressionparser

Interface Function

All Known Implementing Classes:
Abs, ACos, ACosR, AddDay, AddHour, AddMinute, AddMonth, AddNanoSecond, AddSecond, AddYear, Array, ArrayConcat, ArrayCount, ArrayDiff, ArrayDistinct, ArrayFlat, ArrayFlip, ArrayGet, ArrayIncludes, ArrayIndexOf, ArrayInsert, ArrayIntersect, ArrayJoin, ArrayKeys, ArrayLastIndexOf, ArrayReplace, ArrayReverse, ArrayRotate, ArraySet, ArrayShuffle, ArraySlice, ArraySort, ArraySwap, ArrayUnion, ArrayValues, ASin, ASinR, ATan, ATan2, ATan2R, ATanR, Avg, Between, Bound, Ceil, CharAt, Concat, ConcatWs, Cos, CosR, Cot, CotR, Cp, Cpk, Crc32, Date, DateTime, Day, Degrees, DiffDay, DiffHour, DiffMinute, DiffMonth, DiffNanoSecond, DiffSecond, DiffYear, EndsWith, Fact, FirstDayOfMonth, FirstDayOfNextMonth, FirstDayOfNextYear, FirstDayOfYear, FirstInMonth, Floor, Format, Hour, IfNull, Includes, IndexOf, IsArray, IsBlank, IsDate, IsDateTime, IsEmpty, IsNull, IsNumber, IsString, IsTime, Kurtosis, LastDayOfMonth, LastDayOfYear, LastIndexOf, Left, Length, Like, Log, Log10, Log2, Lower, LPad, LTrim, Max, Md5, Mean, Min, Minute, Modus, Month, Nanosecond, Now, Percentile, Pow, Radians, Random, Range, RegexFind, RegexMatch, RegexReplace, RegexSplit, Repeat, Replace, Reverse, Right, Round, RPad, RTrim, Sec, Second, SecR, SetDay, SetHour, SetMinute, SetMonth, SetNanoSecond, SetSecond, SetYear, Sha1, Sha256, Sign, Sin, SinR, Skewness, Split, Sqrt, StartsWith, Std, SubDay, SubHour, SubMinute, SubMonth, SubNanoSecond, SubSecond, Substr, Substring, SubYear, Sum, Tan, TanR, Time, Trim, Upper, Uuid, Var, Week, Year
public interface Function
Base-Interface for all functions
